name: phishguard-heavy-data-eval
description: Large-scale defensive QA distribution for PhishGuard.
safety_rules: Do not generate, host, modify, deploy, or interact with phishing pages.
Use browser automation only for legitimate sites, official test pages, and local benign fixtures.
Use API-only evaluation for live phishing-feed URLs.

sources: Google Safe Browsing official test URLs
phishing_malicious_official_test.handling: API-only for live feed URLs; browser testing only for official safe test pages.

synthetic_suspicious.handling: Safe lexical stress tests only; no hosted credential collection pages.

production_note: Real internet traffic can be 90-95% legitimate, so final reports should include both this 70/30 evaluation view and a production-weighted interpretation.
